abstract: This research investigates the complex challenges and shifting dynamics that define entrepreneurship and innovation within the rapidly evolving digital landscape. By employing a mixed-methods approach that integrates both qualitative and quantitative analyses, the study offers a holistic perspective on how emerging technological disruptions reshape traditional business paradigms. This integrated framework facilitates a nuanced understanding of the unique obstacles and opportunities inherent in the digital era. Ultimately, the findings provide critical insights for entrepreneurs and policymakers, offering a strategic roadmap to navigate uncertainty and foster sustainable innovation in an increasingly digitized global economy.
